statement: For each fixed augmented trace-core index N, the finite Schur-repaired core quadratic form q_N^Schur is nonnegative.

finiteSchurRepairInputStatus.label: finite Schur repair input
finiteSchurRepairInputStatus.reason: The finite augmented Schur repair consequence theorem is closed.

finiteRepairOperatorInputStatus.label: finite repair operator input
finiteRepairOperatorInputStatus.reason: The finite repair operator D_aug,N is nonnegative.

finiteRepairedCoreFormInputStatus.label: finite repaired core form input
finiteRepairedCoreFormInputStatus.reason: The finite repaired Schur core form is nonnegative.

fixedCoreSchurPositiveConsequenceStatus.label: fixed-core Schur positivity consequence
fixedCoreSchurPositiveConsequenceStatus.reason: Therefore q_N^Schur>=0 on every fixed augmented trace core.

proof: Import the finite augmented Schur repair consequence theorem.
Read off finite repaired form positivity and D_aug,N>=0.
Expose only q_N^Schur>=0 for downstream fixed-core cone summation.
